forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the Barossa Valley, slight chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the Barossa Valley in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southwesterly during the day then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloud clearing. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Cloud clearing. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the east, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the north, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers on and east of the ranges, slight chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. The chance of fog west of Nullarbor in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloud clearing. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloud clearing. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Marla later this evening. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloudy. High chance of rain east of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding north of Leigh Creek. Winds northeast to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening then tending northeast to southeasterly in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain east of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the far northeast in the morning and afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 33.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 33.
